description: Prisma schema validates and generates client without errors
Database migrations run successfully against PostgreSQL
steps: Verify all tables are created in PostgreSQL
Verify elections, candidates, issue_categories, raw_materials, candidate_positions, question_sets, questions, user_sessions, user_answers, users tables exist

description: Seed script populates database with sample election data
steps: Verify at least one election is created
Verify at least two candidates per election

description: Unique constraint on candidate_positions(candidate_id, issue_id) prevents duplicates
steps: Attempt to insert two positions for same candidate+issue
Verify second insert fails with unique constraint error

description: GET /api/elections returns list of elections
steps: Verify response is JSON array of election objects
Verify each election has id, name, type, district, electionDate, status

description: GET /api/elections?zip={zipCode} filters elections by zip code
steps: Send GET request with valid zip code
Verify only elections matching that district are returned
Send GET request with nonexistent zip code

description: GET /api/elections/{electionId}/candidates returns candidates for an election
steps: Send GET request with valid election ID
Verify response contains candidate objects with id, name, party, incumbent
Send GET request with invalid election ID

description: GET /api/elections/{electionId}/questions returns question set
steps: Send GET request with valid election ID
Verify each question has questionText, positiveDirection, background, displayOrder
Verify questions are sorted by displayOrder

description: POST /api/match accepts answers and returns match results
steps: Send POST with election_id and answers array
Verify response contains candidates array with matchPercentage
Verify response contains issueBreakdown per candidate

description: POST /api/match handles 'not_interested' answers correctly
steps: Send POST with some answers as 'not_interested'
Verify those issues are excluded from match calculation
Verify matchPercentage is calculated only on answered issues

description: POST /api/match creates anonymous user session
steps: Verify a user_session record is created in DB
Verify no PII is stored in the session

description: GET /api/candidates/{candidateId}/positions returns detailed positions
steps: Send GET request with valid candidate ID
Verify each position has positionSummary, positionScore, confidence, source
Verify supporting evidence and source links are included

description: API returns proper error responses for invalid inputs
API endpoints handle missing candidate positions gracefully
steps: Verify candidate appears in results with 0% or indication of no data

description: Match engine calculates correct percentage for identical positions
steps: Provide user answers identical to candidate positions

description: Match engine calculates correct percentage for opposite positions
steps: Provide user answers that are exact opposites of candidate positions

description: Match engine applies stronger weight to strongly_agree/strongly_disagree
steps: Create scenario where strong stance on one issue vs weak stance on another
Verify the strongly-held issue has more influence on final score
Compare with equal-weight scenario to confirm difference

description: Match engine excludes 'not_interested' issues from calculation
steps: Calculate match with all issues answered
Calculate match with some issues as not_interested
Verify not_interested issues don't affect the final percentage

description: Match engine handles edge case of all issues 'not_interested'
steps: Provide all answers as not_interested (empty userAnswers)

description: Match engine handles candidate with no position on some issues
steps: Provide user answers for issues where candidate has no position
Verify calculation only uses issues both parties have positions on

description: Match engine correctly ranks multiple candidates
steps: Verify candidates are ranked by matchPercentage descending
Verify ranking reflects actual position alignment

description: Match engine returns issue-by-issue breakdown
steps: Verify issueBreakdown array contains entry for each compared issue
Verify each entry has userScore, candidateScore, similarity, weight

description: Landing page loads and displays VoteMatch branding
Landing page 'Get Started' button navigates to quiz flow
steps: Verify navigation to /quiz or district selection page

description: Landing page is responsive on mobile viewport
steps: Verify all content is visible without horizontal scroll

description: District selection page allows entering zip code
steps: Verify zip code input field is present

description: District selection shows available elections after zip code entry
steps: Verify each election shows name and date
Verify user can select an election

description: District selection shows candidates after election selection
steps: Verify each candidate shows name and party

description: District selection handles no elections found gracefully
steps: Enter zip code with no matching elections
Verify friendly message is shown (not error)
Verify user can try a different zip code

description: District selection validates zip code format
steps: Enter invalid zip code (letters, too short, too long)

description: Quiz page displays questions one at a time or in a list
steps: Navigate to quiz page for a valid election
Verify at least one question is displayed
Verify question text is visible and readable

description: Quiz page shows 6 answer options per question
steps: Verify 6 options are shown: Strongly Agree, Agree, Neutral, Disagree, Strongly Disagree, Not Interested

description: Quiz page allows selecting one answer per question
steps: Click a different option for the same question
Verify the first is deselected and the new one is selected

description: Quiz page has expandable background explanation per question
steps: Verify background expand trigger is visible

description: Quiz page shows progress indicator
steps: Verify progress indicator shows current question / total questions

description: Quiz page submit button sends answers to match API
steps: Verify POST request is sent to /api/match
Verify request contains election_id and answers array

description: Quiz page handles partial completion (not all questions answered)
steps: Verify unanswered questions are either prompted or treated as not_interested

description: Quiz page is responsive on mobile viewport
steps: Verify questions and options are fully visible
Verify options are tappable without overlap

description: Quiz page uses plain language at 6th-grade reading level
steps: Verify no political jargon or technical terms
Verify sentences are short and clear

description: Results page shows match ranking with percentages
steps: Verify each candidate is listed with name and match percentage
Verify candidates are ordered by match percentage descending
Verify wording says 'policy positions are closest to yours' not 'vote for'

description: Results page shows issue-by-issue comparison
steps: Navigate to or expand issue-by-issue comparison
Verify each issue shows user's choice vs each candidate's position

description: Results page shows source attribution for candidate positions
steps: Verify source label is shown (official website / voting record / candidate self-report)
Verify source link is clickable and opens in new tab

description: Results page shows 'No public position found' when applicable
steps: View results for candidate with missing positions
Verify 'No public position found' label appears for that issue
Verify it is clearly distinguished from actual positions

description: Results page is responsive on mobile viewport
Results page handles candidate with conflicting self-report vs public record
steps: View results for candidate with both ai_extracted and candidate_self_report positions
Verify they are clearly labeled and distinguished

description: Results page allows navigating back to retake quiz
steps: Verify user returns to quiz with answers cleared

description: Full user flow works end-to-end: landing → district → quiz → results
steps: Enter zip code and select election
Verify match percentages are displayed correctly

description: Browser back button works correctly through the flow
steps: Complete the quiz flow to results
Verify return to quiz page with answers preserved

description: Direct URL navigation to /quiz without election context redirects
steps: Navigate directly to /quiz without prior district selection
Verify redirect to district selection or helpful error message

description: User sessions are anonymous — no PII stored
steps: Verify no IP address, device info, or cookies linking to identity
Verify session only has election_id and created_at

description: No user registration required for core voter flow
steps: Navigate through entire flow: landing → district → quiz → results
Verify no authentication headers required in API calls

description: Quiz page loads within 3 seconds on simulated 3G connection
steps: Verify page is interactive within 3 seconds

description: Match calculation completes within 500ms for 15 questions × 5 candidates
steps: Set up 5 candidates with 15 issue positions each

description: Question wording contains no leading language
Match algorithm gives no advantage to any candidate regardless of data source
steps: Compare match calculation for ai_extracted vs candidate_self_report positions
Verify no bonus or penalty for claimed profiles

description: Seed data covers a realistic election scenario
steps: Verify at least 1 election with 3+ candidates
Verify questions are pre-generated for the election

description: Seed data includes candidates with missing positions for edge case testing
steps: Verify at least one candidate has positions on only some issues
Verify at least one issue has 'position unclear' or low confidence
Verify results display handles these gracefully

description: Quiz page is keyboard-navigable
steps: Verify all answer options are focusable
Verify submit button is reachable via Tab

description: All interactive elements have proper aria labels
steps: Verify radio inputs or buttons have aria-label or associated label

description: Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
steps: Check text contrast ratios on landing, quiz, and results pages
Verify body text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio
Verify headings have at least 3:1 contrast ratio

description: API errors return structured JSON error responses
steps: Send malformed request to each API endpoint
Verify all return JSON with error field

description: UI shows user-friendly error when API fails
steps: Simulate API failure (stop server or mock error)
Verify user-friendly error message appears (not raw error)

description: UI handles network timeout gracefully
steps: Verify timeout message and retry option

description: Project builds without errors (npm run build)
ESLint passes without errors
Dev server starts and serves pages
UI text is externalized and ready for multi-language support
steps: Verify UI strings are not hardcoded in components
Verify a translation mechanism is in place or planned
Verify language can be switched without code changes

description: Landing page has proper meta tags for SEO
steps: View page source of landing page
Verify <meta name='description'> is present and descriptive
Verify SSR renders the content (not client-only)

description: Results page is server-rendered for shareability
steps: View page source of a results page
Verify candidate match data is in the HTML (not loaded client-side only)
